moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of 2026, occurred today at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Daylight Max
angles.copy: Today is the Summer Solstice, the longest day of 2026! How are you making the most of all that extra daylight?

angles.name: Stonehenge Tribute
angles.copy: Did you wake early for the Summer Solstice sunrise? Thousands gathered at Stonehenge for the year's longest day.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Closes
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival concludes today after four days of music, with The Cure, The Kooks, and David Gray among the final acts.

angles.name: Festival Wrap-Up
angles.copy: That's a wrap for the Isle of Wight Festival 2026! Who was your highlight from the weekend's incredible lineup?

angles.name: The Cure
angles.copy: The Cure brought the Isle of Wight Festival to a close with a legendary performance today. What's your favourite Cure track?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Ends
moments.blurb: Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival wraps up today with headliners including Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Vibes
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is over for another year! Glasgow Green was buzzing all weekend. Who did you see?

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, closes tonight! Hope everyone had an amazing time in Glasgow.

moments.title: Taylor Swift Dominates UK Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' remains at number one on the UK Official Singles Chart for the week ending June 25th, achieving the biggest week of single sales in three years.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Taylor Swift is still holding strong at UK #1 with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'! The Swifties are out in force.

angles.name: Biggest Sales Week
angles.copy: Massive news for Taylor Swift! Her latest single had the biggest sales week in three years to secure that #1 spot.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Benson Boone
moments.blurb: American pop singer Benson Boone, known for 'Beautiful Things', turns 24 on June 25th.

angles.name: Benson's 24th
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to Benson Boone, who turns 24 on June 25th! What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: Beautiful Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Benson Boone, the voice behind 'Beautiful Things', celebrates his 24th birthday this Thursday.

moments.title: Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Lenovo Austrian Grand Prix takes place this weekend, June 26-28, at the Red Bull Ring.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action! The Austrian Grand Prix kicks off this Friday. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: Red Bull Ring
angles.copy: The Red Bull Ring awaits! F1 heads to Austria this weekend for the next thrilling race of the season. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Ariana's 33rd
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande this Friday! What's your ultimate Ariana track?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the pop queen! Ariana Grande turns 33 on June 26th. Drop your favourite song to wish her a happy birthday!

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships commence on Monday, June 29th, running until July 12th.

angles.name: Tennis Time
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off next Monday, June 29th. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: The world's best tennis players descend on London next week as Wimbledon begins! Get ready for two weeks of thrilling grass court action.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Nicole's 48th
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on June 29th! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From Pussycat Dolls to X Factor, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 this Monday! Celebrate with her biggest tracks.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Colin Hay
moments.blurb: Men at Work frontman and solo artist Colin Hay, originally from Scotland, turns 72 on June 29th.

angles.name: Colin's 72nd
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the legendary Colin Hay of Men at Work this Monday! Which of his songs always takes you back?

angles.name: Men at Work
angles.copy: It's Colin Hay's birthday on June 29th! Get ready to sing along to some classic Men at Work hits.
